task: C2 - Add Error Boundary + Loading States (Frontend)
deliverables_completed: frontend/app/error.tsx - Global error boundary with Try Again + Go Home buttons
frontend/app/chat/error.tsx - Chat route error boundary with network detection
frontend/app/chat/loading.tsx - Chat loading skeleton (sidebar + chat area)
context_summary: Implemented comprehensive error boundaries and loading states for all frontend routes. Users now see friendly error messages instead of white screens, and loading skeletons provide visual feedback during route transitions.

error_boundaries.global: app/error.tsx - Catches all unhandled errors, shows error details in dev mode
error_boundaries.chat: app/chat/error.tsx - Chat-specific errors, detects network failures
error_boundaries.upload: app/upload/error.tsx - Upload page errors within page layout
error_boundaries.admin: app/admin/error.tsx - Admin dashboard errors, network detection

loading_states.chat: app/chat/loading.tsx - Skeleton sidebar + chat area + input

acceptance_criteria_status.network_failure_ui: ✅ All error boundaries show user-friendly UI

notes: Error boundaries log errors to console for debugging. Loading skeleton provides smooth UX during route transitions. Button component enhanced with asChild prop for Link integration.
